summary_ja: raw-backlog-ingest batch (5 articles): 4 non-AI articles (game dev retrospective, startup culture comparison, web performance measurement, 2001 essay), 1 AI-relevant but already captured (Ash Vardanian NumKong). All skip.

decisions.title: Avalanche Studios NYC Retrospective - An Ambitious Company Ruined by Bad Development Practices

decisions.body_excerpt: I've wanted to write about this since the studio closed a year ago. Now that Contraband is also canceled I think it's time...

decisions.title: How web bloat impacts users with slow devices
decisions.reason_ja: [skip] Non-AI content. Web performance analysis measuring page load times across devices and platforms. While interesting, it has no LLM/AI Agent relevance.
decisions.body_excerpt: In 2017, we looked at how web bloat affects users with slow connections. CPU performance for web apps hasn't scaled nearly as quickly as bandwidth...

decisions.body_excerpt: September 2001. This article explains why much of the next generation of software may be server-based, what that will mean for programmers...

decisions.title: NumKong: 2'000 Mixed Precision Kernels For All
decisions.reason_ja: [skip] AI-relevant but already captured. Log.md [2026-05-27] entry and entities/ash-vardanyan.md already document NumKong/SimSIMD/USearch SIMD work. Entity page Sources section lists this URL.
decisions.body_excerpt: I'm killing my SimSIMD project and re-launching under a new name -- NumKong -- StringZilla's big brother. Around 2'000 SIMD kernels for mixed precision numerics...
